underlying_goal: Test the agent teams feature in Claude Code, then transition to starting work on a Jira ticket (AR-18)
friction_detail: User was spammed by tool use permission prompts and idle notifications from teammates, reducing the smoothness of the experience.
brief_summary: User tested the agent teams feature end-to-end with a mock TODO tracker project, discussed how teams differ from subagents, then pulled context for their next work task — everything worked as expected.
